reviews.review_title: Great game, but slight bug in v1.4
reviews.review_description:
Hey there, love the game but just to let you know the v1.4 festive switch on the main menu doesn't quite work. It switches festive off for the menu screen, but it's still on in the game (and is wrong when back to menu after game end). Also, is there an in game 'exit to menu scree' option anywhere?I'm a festive sort, but wouldn't mind a few games without it! Keep up the great work. Oh, lastly, when in 2D mode the Xmas tree is high and not on the ground as in 3D. (tested on Quest 3 512GB, 19/12/24)

UPDATE: 26/12/24: Thanks so much for being so responsive, the v1.4.1 fixes & updates all working perfectly. I think it would be very wise for you to make a new promo clip (making sure to feature mixed reality), as this is a real undiscovered gem. Please keep up the fine work!

developer_response.body: I'm glad you like it and thank you for the great review! There's another small update where the tree position has been corrected in 2D mode. I hope you have fun with the game!
